title: ARBOR HOUSE PORTLAND - 211info
text: ARBOR HOUSE PORTLAND ARBOR HOUSE PORTLAND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a culturally and gender-specific sober living home environment. Residents have access to peer support and mental health services, resume-building and vocational guidance, assistance navigating social services and criminal and family courts, and connection to the local recovery community. Must agree to attend biweekly meetings with house leadership and at least 2 outside recovery-based mutual support meetings per week. Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female or femme who are in recovery from substance use disorder Hours: No standard hours Email (423) 598-3678 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (423) 598-3678 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or call or visit website for more information FEES: $1000 per month DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Sober Living Homes * LGBTQ2+ Issues Sober Living Homes * Women If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
